subject: A close-up portrait of a bearded male-presenting humanoid figure with a glowing runic halo passing across his eyes at the level of the brow
description: An extreme close-up portrait of a bearded humanoid figure facing directly forward. A luminous circular ring — etched or glowing with rune-like markings — floats horizontally across the face at eye level, bisecting the brow. The eyes visible beneath the ring appear illuminated, glowing faintly. The figure wears a dark garment visible at the collar and appears to have some kind of pack or equipment at the shoulder. The background is dark and indistinct, out of focus foliage or stone. The overall mood is focused, inward, visionary. This is a recipient-of-blessing framing, not a depiction of Iona the angel.
foreground: bearded humanoid face with glowing runic halo at eye level
background: dark indistinct, dark green or gray out-of-focus
emotion: serene focus, visionary intensity, inner light
